title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 22 2026

section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 22 2026
summary:
Main
Iron ore futures showed a slight upward trend today. The main contract I2609 closed at 786.5 RMB/ton, up 0.32%from the previous trading day. Spot prices also rose by 1-3 RMB/ton.
